value.body:
Introduce a collapsible sidebar interaction for the app shell/navigation sidebar.

Scope:
- Add a visible sidebar collapse/expand toggle.
- Persist collapsed state where appropriate for the current app behavior.
- Add keyboard shortcut support for toggling the sidebar.
- Ensure collapsed and expanded states remain accessible and usable.
- Update relevant UI tests or interaction coverage.

Acceptance criteria:
- Users can collapse and expand the sidebar using a UI control.
- Users can toggle the sidebar with a documented keyboard shortcut.
- Sidebar state behaves consistently across navigation or reloads if existing app preferences support persistence.
- Keyboard shortcut does not conflict with existing shortcuts.
- Layout adapts cleanly in both collapsed and expanded states.

frontmatter.title: Add sidebar collapse toggle with keyboard shortcut support

value.title: Add sidebar collapse toggle with keyboard shortcut support
